case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS THOMAS SANDRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $160.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS SANDRA $40.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $91.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
